name: IEither<TLeft, TRight>
summary: Object containing an instance of one of two potential types, labeled "Left" or "Right".

methods.name: BindLeft(System.Func<TLeft, Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TNewLeft, TRight>>)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TNewLeft, TRight> BindLeft<TNewLeft>(System.Func<TLeft, Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TNewLeft, TRight>> selector)
methods.summary: If the IEither(TLeft, TRight) instance contains a Left value, project the Left value into a new IEither(TNewLeft, TRight). If the instance contains a Right value, just return the instance.

params.name: selector
params.doc: Function used to project a Left value.

methods.name: BindRight(System.Func<TRight, Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TLeft, TNewRight>>)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TLeft, TNewRight> BindRight<TNewRight>(System.Func<TRight, Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TLeft, TNewRight>> selector)
methods.summary: If the IEither(TLeft, TRight) instance contains a Right value, project the Right value into a new IEither(TLeft, TNewRight). If the instance contains a Left value, just return the instance.

params.name: selector
params.doc: Function used to project a Right value.

methods.name: Match(System.Func<TLeft, T>, System.Func<TRight, T>)
methods.signature: T Match<T>(System.Func<TLeft, T> leftCase, System.Func<TRight, T> rightCase)
methods.summary: Produces a new value of type T using one of the given functions, based on whether the IEither(TLeft, TRight) contains a Left or Right value.

params.name: leftCase
params.doc: Function used to create a result from a Left value.

params.name: rightCase
params.doc: Function used to create a result from a Right value.

methods.name: Select(System.Func<TLeft, TNewLeft>, System.Func<TRight, TNewRight>)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TNewLeft, TNewRight> Select<TNewLeft, TNewRight>(System.Func<TLeft, TNewLeft> leftSelector, System.Func<TRight, TNewRight> rightSelector)
methods.summary: Create a new IEither(TNewLeft, TNewRight) instance by passing the value the a conversion function. Which function is selected depends on whether it is a Right or Left value.

params.name: leftSelector
params.doc: Function used to convert a Left value.

params.name: rightSelector
params.doc: Function used to convert a Right value.

properties.name: IsLeft
properties.summary: Specifies if this instance contains a Left value. If true, it does. If false, it contains a Right value.

properties.name: LeftValue
properties.summary: Attempts to get a Left value.

properties.name: RightValue
properties.summary: Attempts to get a Right value.
